seasons.description: The current Call of Duty seasonal cycle for Black Ops 7 and Warzone adds new maps, modes, weapons, events, Battle Pass content, and a new Launch Pad POI in Verdansk.
Season 02 brought new and returning multiplayer maps and modes, new Zombies content, endgame progression updates, and a winter refresh for Rebirth Island in Warzone.
The first Black Ops 7 and Warzone live season introduced the initial seasonal roadmap, Battle Pass, and cross-game content cadence for multiplayer, Zombies, endgame, and Warzone.
